Nodes.Summary: Text [ChoiceDialog]: "Mad Mozak's burning wreck comes to a rest on the rubble strewn floor of the Killing Ring.      [$emote]The Thugz at the…" (+2 choices)
Text [ScreenTop]: "You must Kill Mad Mozak before you exit"

Text.Main:
Mad Mozak's burning wreck comes to a rest on the rubble strewn floor of the Killing Ring.  

[$emote]The Thugz at the rim begin to honk their horns in cacophonous defiance.[$/emote]

Mozak's Key ring lies in the contaminated dirt, your trophy and prize.  


Do you wish to leave the Killing Ring?  
You could stay and master this arena, just call INC to leave.
You must Kill Mad Mozak before you exit
